expected_rank_reason: Same-day case with near-perfect site and continuity fit should rank first.
Older entry with accumulated fairness debt should outrank a fresher similar candidate.
On-track entry remains eligible but should stay behind tighter-deadline better-fit pairs.
Remote-capable entry can outrank in-person only candidates when supply matches and deadline pressure is higher.
Recent unsuccessful offer history should apply cooldown before reissuing similar supply.
Expired entry must stop receiving local offers and escalate to callback instead of ranking.
